p258_arc_milestone_chain.description: Prediction-accuracy-only research intake protocol (read-only). External-agent prompt (3 method directions), scoring rubric, hard rejection rules, P257A baseline + P256A NULL risk boundary. 22/22 tests PASS.

External-response evaluation. D2 HARD_REJECT (L82/L91/L73/L104/L105). D1 REJECT_INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE. D3 AdversarialNullSurvivorGate ACCEPT — selected as pre-registration candidate (methodology gate only, not predictor). PR #373 merged. 40/40 tests PASS.

D3 AdversarialNullSurvivorGate read-only pre-registration design. Matched adversarial-null family (M≥1000), provenance/leakage gates, chronological OOS, paired-vs-P257A + null-percentile endpoints, BH-FDR+Bonferroni, 6 risk-control triggers. Falsification-only. 26/26 tests PASS.

D3 gate read-only implementation plan. Module boundaries (6 layers + import-ban), proposed future module names, data contracts, 6-point validation contract, artifact schema (gate_decision ∈ {REJECTED, NOT_YET_REJECTED}), 8 STOP gates. Plan only. PR #374 merged. 26/26 tests PASS.

D3 gate read-only skeleton / contract tests. GateStatus limited to REJECTED / NOT_YET_REJECTED. Schema dataclasses (CandidateInput, P257ABaselineInput, MatchedNullFamily, GateOutput) and d3_gate package created. PR #376 merged.

D3 gate read-only contract validators implemented in gate_validation.py. 6 validators: no-approval-status, candidate-provenance, timestamp-cutoff, P257A-baseline, matched-null-family, correction-family. Contract validation only — no executable gate, no nulls, no p-values.

Synthetic-fixture-only contract validator hardening. Synthetic fixture builders and edge-case tests for complete valid contracts, missing/invalid fields, timestamp violations, baseline/null mismatches, correction-family omissions, forbidden statuses. PR #377/378 merged.

Read-only contract-validation integration plan. Defines validator invocation order (6 steps, fail-closed), 5 allowed input contract boundaries, future validation report schema, import boundary plan (only schemas.py + gate_validation.py allowed), 7 STOP gates, future task split. PR #379 merged. 74/74 tests PASS.

Read-only contract-validation integration skeleton. Created integration_skeleton.py with static metadata (VALIDATOR_INVOCATION_ORDER, ALLOWED_INPUT_CONTRACT_BOUNDARIES, FAIL_CLOSED_POLICY, FORBIDDEN_IMPORTS_AND_PATHS, safety constants), build_contract_validation_plan() (static dict), run_contract_validation_flow() (NotImplementedError). PR #380 merged. 85/85 tests PASS.

Read-only synthetic integration skeleton tests / dry-contract fixtures. 114 tests covering complete 6-validator round-trip with synthetic fixtures, 13 invalid fixture cases, 4 static safety cases, validator order guards, fail-closed policy, forbidden import/function checks. PR #381 merged. 114/114 tests PASS.

final_d3_arc_status.summary: D3 contract-validation infrastructure is documentation/skeleton/contract-validation only. The arc is closed as a read-only foundation.

schemas_py.contents: GateStatus enum (REJECTED / NOT_YET_REJECTED only), CandidateInput, P257ABaselineInput, MatchedNullFamily, GateOutput dataclasses

gate_validation_py.contents: 6 read-only contract validators (validate_no_approval_status_contract, validate_candidate_provenance_contract, validate_timestamp_cutoff_contract, validate_p257a_baseline_contract, validate_matched_null_family_contract, validate_correction_family_contract), ContractValidationError, ValidationResult

integration_skeleton_py.contents: VALIDATOR_INVOCATION_ORDER, ALLOWED_INPUT_CONTRACT_BOUNDARIES, FAIL_CLOSED_POLICY, FORBIDDEN_IMPORTS_AND_PATHS, safety constants, build_contract_validation_plan() (static dict), run_contract_validation_flow() (NotImplementedError)

test_inventory.total_tests_across_arc: 372+ tests (P258E through P258J) — all PASS on main

governance_final_recommendation.arc_status: CLOSED — P258 D3 contract-validation infrastructure arc is complete as read-only foundation
governance_final_recommendation.rationale: The arc has established a robust read-only foundation: schemas, validators, integration plan, skeleton, and synthetic dry-contract test coverage. Executable gate evaluation, null generation, and real candidate method execution require separate future authorization and significant additional work.

future_task_options_requiring_separate_e.description: Read-only audit/index page for D3 contract artifacts only — documentation only, no executable gate
New prediction-hypothesis intake — only if user wants new research; separate explicit authorization required
Executable gate evaluation design only (not implementation) — only with explicit authorization; does not imply execution

forbidden_next_tasks: running D3 on real candidate methods
